description:
Remove the `deft` UI module (unmaintained, sluggish with many files) and
replace with consult-org-roam for ripgrep-powered full-text search across
notes, integrating with the existing vertico stack. org-roam-node-find
already covers most of deft's use case.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (doom! init block, line ~48)

Change: comment out or remove `deft`, add consult-org-roam package
title: Replace Deft with consult-org-roam
